title: Implement: Forwarding buffer with backpressure (all implementations)
description:
Policy: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md Forwarding Buffer. Currently MISSING in all implementations.

Spec requires:
- MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES = 8
- MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE = 2
- Total forwarding buffer: 16 packets max
- NACK upstream when source exceeds limit

Audit (2026-07-11): Confirmed MISSING. Decomposed into:
- project-LICHEN-qbi6.1: Python implementation
- project-LICHEN-qbi6.2: Rust implementation
- project-LICHEN-qbi6.3: C/Zephyr implementation
